response.justification: Szabo has strong staff-level software engineering fundamentals and relevant current experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP at re:cinq. However, the AI/GenAI focus is very recent; his 15-year career has been primarily general full-stack development. Critical gaps include no demonstrated expertise with vector databases, RAG architectures, or data pipelines—all core to the role. Python experience is not mentioned, only TypeScript. While his recent role suggests he's transitioning into this domain, he lacks the proven depth in applied GenAI systems that the role expects.
strengths: Current role directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators—directly relevant to the technical stack
Staff-level experience with demonstrated leadership, mentoring, and ability to work across multiple domains and languages
Strong TypeScript/Node.js expertise and proven ability to build production systems on AWS and cloud platforms
concerns: No demonstrated experience with vector databases or RAG architectures—both explicitly required for the role
AI/GenAI focus is very recent (current role since April 2025); 15-year career is primarily general software engineering, not AI-driven solutions
Python not listed in skills despite being a required language; data pipeline expertise not clearly demonstrated

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and AI-agent infrastructure work
Missing vector database and RAG expertise
Strong full-stack engineering fundamentals at staff level
